title: rosa afzeliana var. genuina
intro: Rosa afzeliana var. genuina, also known as the African rose, is a species of rose plant native to tropical Africa, characterized by its fragrant flowers and thorny stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa afzeliana var. genuina include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing protection against infections and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to make tea, topical creams, and other medicinal products.
